candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.
Cadastral parcel data from Matrikkelen, including parcel polygons, parcel identifiers, municipality attributes, parcel area, and metadata for linking parcels to cadastral property units.
Snow avalanche susceptibility data showing areas that may be exposed to snow avalanche hazard. Useful for spatial overlay with buildings and parcels in hazard analysis.
Soil and flood landslide susceptibility data showing potential runout areas for soil slides and flood-related landslides. Useful for hazard overlay and risk screening.

Building and cadastral building data from Matrikkelen, including building points (representasjonspunkt), building type, building number, current building status, municipality attributes, and identifiers for linking buildings to addresses and properties.

1.description: resolve kommunenummer and municipality bbox for Lillestrøm

2.description: get parcels for the resolved kommunenummer with geometries

3.description: get quick-clay polygons that intersect the municipality bbox to prefilter the hazard layer

4.description: get 1 km grid cells that intersect the municipality bbox

5.description: select parcels that intersect quick-clay polygons (parcels-in-quickclay)

6.description: assign parcels-in-quickclay to 1 km grid cells

8.description: sort grid cells by parcel count descending

candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.
Cadastral parcel data from Matrikkelen, including parcel polygons, parcel identifiers, municipality attributes, parcel area, and metadata for linking parcels to cadastral property units.
Snow avalanche susceptibility data showing areas that may be exposed to snow avalanche hazard. Useful for spatial overlay with buildings and parcels in hazard analysis.
Soil and flood landslide susceptibility data showing potential runout areas for soil slides and flood-related landslides. Useful for hazard overlay and risk screening.

Building and cadastral building data from Matrikkelen, including building points (representasjonspunkt), building type, building number, current building status, municipality attributes, and identifiers for linking buildings to addresses and properties.

iterations.ai_content: {"query_mode":"multi_db","planned_steps":[{"step":1,"action":"query","database":"kommuner","purpose":"resolve kommunenummer and municipality bbox for Lillestrøm"},{"step":2,"action":"query","database":"matrikkeleneiendomskartteig","purpose":"get parcels for the resolved kommunenummer with geometries"},{"step":3,"action":"query","database":"kvikkleire","purpose":"get quick-clay polygons that intersect the municipality bbox to prefilter the hazard layer"},{"step":4,"action":"query","database":"statistiskrutenett1km","purpose":"get 1 km grid cells that intersect the municipality bbox"},{"step":5,"action":"spatial_join","database":null,"purpose":"select parcels that intersect quick-clay polygons (parcels-in-quickclay)"},{"step":6,"action":"spatial_join","database":null,"purpose":"assign parcels-in-quickclay to 1 km grid cells"},{"step":7,"action":"aggregate","database":null,"purpose":"count parcels per grid cell"},{"step":8,"action":"sort","database":null,"purpose":"sort grid cells by parcel count descending"},{"step":9,"action":"limit","database":null,"purpose":"return top 5 grid cells"}]}

candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.
Cadastral parcel data from Matrikkelen, including parcel polygons, parcel identifiers, municipality attributes, parcel area, and metadata for linking parcels to cadastral property units.
Snow avalanche susceptibility data showing areas that may be exposed to snow avalanche hazard. Useful for spatial overlay with buildings and parcels in hazard analysis.
Soil and flood landslide susceptibility data showing potential runout areas for soil slides and flood-related landslides. Useful for hazard overlay and risk screening.

Building and cadastral building data from Matrikkelen, including building points (representasjonspunkt), building type, building number, current building status, municipality attributes, and identifiers for linking buildings to addresses and properties.
